entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concept of Chemistry (meaning, branches, applications and relationships with other disciplines)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Assign students in manageable groups to brainstorm on chemical basis of materials from their environment, give the meaning of Chemistry and justifying the reason for studying Chemistry
Project works: Guide students to explore the common industrial products in Tanzania and relate their applications to the importance of Chemistry
entries.assessment: The concept of Chemistry is clearly described
resources: Pictures, diagrams, simulations, animations or videos illustrating the meaning, branches, applications and relationship with other disciplines
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (b) Discuss the contribution of Chemistry in the development of modern society
teaching_learning_activities: Field visit: Guide students to visit any nearby industry, health facilities, mining sites and agricultural farms to appreciate the importance of Chemistry in the development of societies
entries.assessment: The contribution of Chemistry in the development of modern society is clearly recognised
resources: Simulations, animations or videos illustrating the contribution of Chemistry in the development of modern society
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (c) Describe the concept of matter (physical and chemical changes of matter)
teaching_learning_activities: Practical work: Guide students to carry-out hands-on activities to investigate the physical and chemical changes of matter using samples of substances found in their environment
Experimentation: Guide students to perform experiments basing on sublimation of compounds, rusting of iron nails, freezing and evaporation of water and dissolving of salts using distilled water
entries.assessment: The concept of matter is clearly described
resources: Ice, water, source of heat, evaporating basin, metal nails, beaker, table salt, sugar, iodine crystals, magnet, magnesium ribbon, acids, fruits, paper, CuSO4 solution, aluminium foil, candle, CaCO3 , Pb(NO3)2 solution and simulations and videos illustrating physical and chemical changes of matter
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (c) Describe the concept of matter (physical and chemical changes of matter)
teaching_learning_activities: Practical work: Guide students to carry-out hands-on activities to investigate the physical and chemical changes of matter using samples of substances found in their environment

Experimentation: Guide students to perform experiments basing on sublimation of compounds, rusting of iron nails, freezing and evaporation of water and dissolving of salts using distilled water

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (d) Describe the concepts of chemical elements (criteria for assigning chemical symbols), compounds (binary compound) and mixtures (types of solution and separation of mixtures)
teaching_learning_activities: Think-ink-pair-share: Guide students in pairs to think and share about various types of industrial products they commonly use in their home for various activities, reflect on their constituent elements and explain the meaning of element, compound and mixture

Hands-on-minds-on: Assign students to prepare solutions using materials available in their home settings and reflect their properties to practices of using them in various applications such as pharmaceuticals and domestic activities
entries.assessment: The concepts of chemical elements, compounds and mixture are clearly described
resources: Periodic table, copper, zinc, aluminium, iron, sulphur, hydrogen, common salt, iron filings, magnet, powdered sulphur, crucible and lid, heat source, HCl solution, water, chalk FeS, milk, clay soil,
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (d) Describe the concepts of chemical elements (criteria for assigning chemical symbols), compounds (binary compound) and mixtures (types of solution and separation of mixtures)
teaching_learning_activities: Think-ink-pair-share: Guide students in pairs to think and share about various types of industrial products they commonly use in their home for various activities, reflect on their constituent elements and explain the meaning of element, compound and mixture

Hands-on-minds-on: Assign students to prepare solutions using materials available in their home settings and reflect their properties to practices of using them in various applications such as pharmaceuticals and domestic activities
entries.assessment: The concepts of chemical elements, compounds and mixture are clearly described
resources: Periodic table, copper, zinc, aluminium, iron, sulphur, hydrogen, common salt, iron filings, magnet, powdered sulphur, crucible and lid, heat source, HCl solution, water, chalk FeS, milk, clay soil,
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (e) Compare the properties of compounds with those of constituent elements
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to explore the properties of chemical compounds useful in real-life situation
Technological-based learning: Guide students to analyse features of compounds and element from real substances using visual aids
entries.assessment: The properties of compounds are correctly compared with those of constituent elements
resources: margarine, filter paper, funnel, ethanol, iodine crystals, kerosene, ink, sugar, wall charts, and pictures of distillers
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (f) Explain the concept of the periodic table (1st 20 elements in the Periodic Table; metals and non-metals)
teaching_learning_activities: Outdoor activity: Assign students to collect materials in their environment and classify into metals and non-metals
Project works: Assign students to carry-out project task to investigate on different properties of metals and non-metals available in their real life setting and write a report
entries.assessment: The concept of the periodic table is clearly explained
resources: Diagrams, pictures, wall charts, simulations and videos illustrating 1st 20 elements in the Periodic Table; metals and non-metals
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry

teaching_learning_activities: Outdoor activity: Assign students to collect materials in their environment and classify into metals and non-metals

entries.main_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe basic Chemistry laboratory skills (chemistry laboratory rules and safety measures, first aid, fire and firefighting, and Chemistry laboratory apparatus)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to interpret basic laboratory skills related to rules and precautions, safety measures and chemical warning signs
Guest speaker from fire brigade: Guide students to interpret classes of fire and practice on firefighting basing on speaker’s instructions and write a report
Outdoor activity: Guide students to practice on extinguishing small fires
entries.assessment: Basic Chemistry laboratory skills are clearly described
resources: Laboratory manuals, models, pictures, wall charts with written laboratory rules, first aid kit, laboratory apparatus, fire extinguishers and videos illustrating basic chemistry laboratory skills
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe basic Chemistry laboratory skills (chemistry laboratory rules and safety measures, first aid, fire and firefighting, and Chemistry laboratory apparatus)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to interpret basic laboratory skills related to rules and precautions, safety measures and chemical warning signs
Guest speaker from fire brigade: Guide students to interpret classes of fire and practice on firefighting basing on speaker’s instructions and write a report
Outdoor activity: Guide students to practice on extinguishing small fires
entries.assessment: Basic Chemistry laboratory skills are clearly described
resources: Laboratory manuals, models, pictures, wall charts with written laboratory rules, first aid kit, laboratory apparatus, fire extinguishers and videos illustrating basic chemistry laboratory skills
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (b) Perform experiments on the changes of matter from one state to another
teaching_learning_activities: Experimentation: Guide students to perform experiments on various materials from the environment and laboratory, and use chemicals to demonstrate changes of matter
entries.assessment: Experiments on the changes of matter from one state to another are correctly performed
resources: Ice, water, iron chips, heat source, clay soil, margarine, filter paper, funnel, iodine crystals, anhydrous CuSO4 kerosene, salt and sugar
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (b) Perform experiments on the changes of matter from one state to another
teaching_learning_activities: Experimentation: Guide students to perform experiments on various materials from the environment and laboratory, and use chemicals to demonstrate changes of matter
entries.assessment: Experiments on the changes of matter from one state to another are correctly performed
resources: Ice, water, iron chips, heat source, clay soil, margarine, filter paper, funnel, iodine crystals, anhydrous CuSO4 kerosene, salt and sugar
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (b) Perform experiments on the changes of matter from one state to another
teaching_learning_activities: Experimentation: Guide students to perform experiments on various materials from the environment and laboratory, and use chemicals to demonstrate changes of matter

entries.main_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (c) Perform experiments on separation of different mixtures using different methods
teaching_learning_activities: Home-based project: Assign students to carry-out simple experiments on separating mixtures in their daily life
Experimentation: Guide students to perform experiments on separating mixtures basing on specific properties of substances such as solubility and boiling point

Questions and answers: Guide students to present the common and commercial applications of the various methods for separating mixtures, for examples simple distillation, fractional distillation and decantation
entries.assessment: Experiments on separation of different mixtures using different methods are correctly performed
resources: Common salt, iron filings, magnet, powdered Sulphur, crucible and lid, heat source, HCl solution, FeS, milk, clay soil, margarine, kerosene, filter paper, funnel, ethanol, kerosene, ink, sugar, distillation system and animations or videos illustrating separation of different mixtures using different methods
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Conduct experiments in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (c) Perform experiments on separation of different mixtures using different methods
teaching_learning_activities: Home-based project: Assign students to carry-out simple experiments on separating mixtures in their daily life
Experimentation: Guide students to perform experiments on separating mixtures basing on specific properties of substances such as solubility and boiling point

Questions and answers: Guide students to present the common and commercial applications of the various methods for separating mixtures, for examples simple distillation, fractional distillation and decantation
entries.assessment: Experiments on separation of different mixtures using different methods are correctly performed
resources: Common salt, iron filings, magnet, powdered Sulphur, crucible and lid, heat source, HCl solution, FeS, milk, clay soil, margarine, kerosene, filter paper, funnel, ethanol, kerosene, ink, sugar, distillation system and animations or videos illustrating separation of different mixtures using different methods
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: Demonstrate mastery of basic concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.specific_competence: Demonstrate mastery of concepts, theories and principles in Chemistry
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the modern concept of atomic structure (Dalton’ s atomic structure and sub-atomic particles)
teaching_learning_activities: Think-ink-pair-share: Guide students in pair to think about the meaning of an atom and its structure
Technological-based learning: Guide students to account for the structure of an atom basing on ICT facilities and write a report
entries.assessment: The modern concept of atomic structure is clearly described
resources: Diagrams, pictures, wall charts, simulations and videos illustrating Dalton’s atomic structure and sub-atomic particles
entries.references: Chemistry Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)
